data.body: e622 Phase 4: authored full oracle (3 files, 12 tests: reconciler test_creation_channel.py inbound_recorded/outbound/legacy_positive/legacy_negative x5, io test_creation_channel.py import+export-guard, test_env_aliasing spec-load). RED confirmed: 5 fail feature-absent (inbound KeyError, placeholder python!=jira, legacy_positive unknown!=jira, import python!=import, spec-load ImportError LEGACY_JIRA_AUTHOR), 7 green guards. Held out the INFERENCE (legacy pos+neg -- the over-fitting-prone part), placeholder identity, outbound, export, spec-load. Gave implementer only 2 happy-path: inbound-jira + import. Dispatched e622 implementer. Full oracle stashed in job-tmp; env_aliasing reverted to HEAD (addition held out).
